ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the commodity was traded */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the action taken (buy/sell) */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the commodity traded */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of transaction (e.g., futures, options) */,
  "transaction_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the transaction */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker or intermediary involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "transaction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was recorded */,
  "trade_venue" TEXT /* Location or platform where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_strategy" TEXT /* Identifier for the trading strategy used */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the action (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity (e.g., HC1905, Y1905) */,
  "commodity_type" TEXT /* Type of the commodity (e.g., equity, bond, derivative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the commodity */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the commodity (if applicable) */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the commodity (if applicable) */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate of the commodity (if applicable) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the commodity is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., futures, options) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction type (e.g., spot, futures, options) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the commodity */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the commodity */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the commodity during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the commodity during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the commodity traded */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the day */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest for the commodity */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the commodity price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., exchange, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the firm */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the transaction */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., trade, error, info) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message or description of the log entry */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the commodity */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the commodity */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the commodity */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the commodity during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the commodity during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the commodity traded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., exchange, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_prices_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)
